privileged_info_summary: The cleanup_spam_campaign task is designed to test an agent's ability to identify and delete 5 spam tickets from the domain '@spam-lottery.xyz' (all from sender 'winner@spam-lottery.xyz') while preserving 1 legitimate ticket from '@legit-lotto.com' (from sender 'account.manager@legit-lotto.com'). The task uses FreeScout, an open-source helpdesk software, running in Docker with synthetically generated tickets created via the Laravel ORM during task setup.
